title: Restoring Public Trust Through UAP Transparency and Whistleblower Protection
committee: Committee on Oversight and Government Reform
subcommittee: Task Force on the Declassification of Federal Secrets
summary: A public hearing examining UAP disclosure, AARO and intelligence-community transparency, witness accounts, and protections for national-security whistleblowers.
whyItMatters: This hearing expands the modern record with new military witnesses, investigative journalism, and a detailed focus on whistleblower protections.
editorialNote: The official committee hearing page and witness statements are primary sources. Witness accounts and allegations should be evaluated individually.

witnesses.name: Jeffrey Nuccetelli
witnesses.testimonySummary: Nuccetelli provided testimony concerning reported UAP events and the handling of witness information.

witnesses.name: Alexandro Wiggins
witnesses.roleAtHearing: UAP witness and U.S. Navy Senior Chief Petty Officer
witnesses.testimonySummary: Wiggins described a February 2023 transmedium UAP event observed aboard USS Jackson and associated sensor evidence.

witnesses.name: George Knapp
witnesses.testimonySummary: Knapp discussed the documentary record, government secrecy, and decades of reporting on UFO and UAP issues.

witnesses.name: Dylan Borland
witnesses.roleAtHearing: UAP witness and U.S. Air Force veteran
witnesses.testimonySummary: Borland provided whistleblower-related testimony and discussed alleged experiences and retaliation concerns.

witnesses.name: Joe Spielberger
witnesses.roleAtHearing: Senior Policy Counsel, Project On Government Oversight
witnesses.testimonySummary: Spielberger addressed gaps in national-security whistleblower protections and the need for stronger safeguards.

documents.label: Official hearing page
documents.sourceType: House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

documents.sourceType: House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

evidenceProfile.summary: This record is based on public congressional or government material. Classified details may remain unavailable.
